description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in DBImageGallery 1.2.2 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the donsimg_base_path parameter to (1) attributes.php, (2) images.php, or (3) scan.php in admin/; or (4) attributes.php, (5) db_utils.php, (6) images.php, (7) utils.php, or (8) values.php in includes/.
